reports.notes: ⚠️ INITIAL: Stopped eating. Mild SGOT/SGPT elevation. Vitamin D deficient. Low calcium & albumin.
🔴 CRISIS: Jaundice developed post-surgery. Bilirubin 3.47 (5x normal), ALT 529, AST 270. Severe liver stress.
✅ RESPONDING: Amoxirum + D5 working. Bilirubin normalized. AST normalized. ALT improving. WBC elevated (inflammation). First CBC.
⚠️ SETBACK: Treatment stopped → ALT spiked to 599 (highest ever). Liver struggling again.
💊 MEROPENEM STARTED: Jaundice returned. ALT 431 (improving). ALP climbing. NT-proBNP normal (heart OK). Showed improvement, eating.
⚠️ ALP PEAK: 1026 (9x normal). Bilirubin up again. Severe protein wasting. Tick fever PCR: ALL NEGATIVE. Lipase normal.
🔴 NEW CRISIS: Severe anemia (HGB 9.3) + thrombocytopenia (platelets 73). Total protein critically low (3.48). Started PLASMA + ERYTHOPOIETIN.
🔴 CURRENT: Anemia worsening (HGB 8.1). Platelets 64. WBC 86.7 (extreme). RR better in AM (cyclic). Appetite fluctuates. Energy ↓ past 4 days. NEW: Burping ×2 days, mild coughing ×1 day.
🔴 CRITICAL: WBC 115 (7x normal!). Severe anemia (HGB 8.7). Platelets 105. Bilirubin elevated. ALT 187. ALP 931 (8x normal). Protein critically low (3.77). Calcium 6.9 (very low).

🚨 EMERGENCY: HGB crashed to 5.8 (was 8.7). RBC 2.45 (half normal). PCV 16.1. WBC 120 (7x normal). Platelets 120 (microscopy). Normocytic normochromic anemia. Leucocytosis. Thrombocytopenia. 💉 250ml BLOOD TRANSFUSION administered.
